_howToAdd: Put modules here ONLY if they are built/patched against this specific firmware binary.

modules.name: iFlytek Global Voice Engine
modules.description: Replaces Cerence with iFlytek. AR/EN/RU/HI + 7 languages. Patches SpeechHMI whitelist. Needs ~1.5GB voice data on /data/navi.
modules.author: ashrafnaji
